title: pelargonium × lasiophyllum
intro: Pelargonium × lasiophyllum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the geranium plant family that is native to South Africa. This plant has been utilized for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, in addition to its antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Rose Geranium can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
